import React,{useState}from'react';import Loader from'./Loader';import axios from'axios';import{buildApiUrl}from'../utils/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Addproducts=()=>{// introduce the hooks
